title: Los Vehículos de Mi Ciudad
learningObjectives: Identify common transportation vehicles in Spanish
Practice asking and answering questions about vehicles
Understand where different vehicles travel (land, air, water)

seo.metaTitle: Los Vehículos de Mi Ciudad - Free Spanish Transportation Book for Kids
seo.metaDescription: Learn Spanish transportation vocabulary with this interactive bilingual book for preschoolers. Teaches car, bus, airplane, train, and more in Spanish and English.

educationalValue.languageSkills: Transportation vocabulary, question formation, descriptive adjectives

parentTips: Point to vehicles when you're out and about: '¡Mira el autobús!'
Make vehicle sounds together: '¡Chu-chu!' for el tren
Practice colors with vehicles: 'el carro rojo' (red car)
Ask your child which vehicle they'd like to ride: '¿En qué quieres viajar?'
funFacts: The word 'carro' is commonly used in Latin America, while 'coche' is used in Spain
Children love to make vehicle sounds - incorporate them when reading!
Transportation vocabulary is essential for daily conversations in Spanish
author: Luna 📚 - Beibei Amigos
